evals.expected_output: Copies all config files from machine to repo, detects new/removed brew packages, updates data.js with new items, updates README.md sections, syncs Claude Code config, and shows a summary of all changes

evals.prompt: instalé unas cosas nuevas con brew y extensiones de vscode, actualiza el repo y la página
evals.expected_output: Detects newly installed brew formulae/casks and VS Code extensions, adds them to data.js with proper schema, updates README sections 2/3/9, copies updated config files, shows summary highlighting what's new

evals.prompt: quiero que mi repo de dotfiles refleje lo que tengo instalado ahora en mi mac
evals.expected_output: Full sync: config files copied, all tool lists compared against data.js, new items added, possibly-removed items flagged, README and setup.sh updated, Claude Code config synced, clear summary printed
